title: Department Manager Vacancy at IKEA India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at IKEA India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!
